verses.text: Love the LORD; remember His acts against Egypt your eyes saw. Remember. Witnessed wonders bind the heart.
Love the LORD; remember His acts against Egypt your eyes saw. Remember. Witnessed wonders bind the heart.
Love the LORD; remember His acts against Egypt your eyes saw. Remember. Witnessed wonders bind the heart.
Love the LORD; remember His acts against Egypt your eyes saw. Remember. Witnessed wonders bind the heart.
They saw what He did in the wilderness; their eyes were witnesses. Witnesses. They knew His power firsthand.
They saw what He did in the wilderness; their eyes were witnesses. Witnesses. They knew His power firsthand.
They saw what He did in the wilderness; their eyes were witnesses. Witnesses. They knew His power firsthand.
Keep the commandments, that you prolong your days. Obey. Obedience secures the land.
Keep the commandments, that you prolong your days. Obey. Obedience secures the land.
The land drinks rain from heaven, cared for by God. Watered. The land depends on God.
The land drinks rain from heaven, cared for by God. Watered. The land depends on God.
The land drinks rain from heaven, cared for by God. Watered. The land depends on God.
If you obey and love Him, He gives rain in its season. Rain. Blessing follows obedience.
If you obey and love Him, He gives rain in its season. Rain. Blessing follows obedience.
If you obey and love Him, He gives rain in its season. Rain. Blessing follows obedience.
Beware lest your heart be deceived to serve other gods. Beware. Idolatry shuts the heavens.
Beware lest your heart be deceived to serve other gods. Beware. Idolatry shuts the heavens.
Lay up these words; teach them; that your days be multiplied. Teach. The word fills the home.
Lay up these words; teach them; that your days be multiplied. Teach. The word fills the home.
Lay up these words; teach them; that your days be multiplied. Teach. The word fills the home.
Lay up these words; teach them; that your days be multiplied. Teach. The word fills the home.
If you cleave to Him, He drives out greater nations. Cleave. God conquers for the faithful.
If you cleave to Him, He drives out greater nations. Cleave. God conquers for the faithful.
If you cleave to Him, He drives out greater nations. Cleave. God conquers for the faithful.
If you cleave to Him, He drives out greater nations. Cleave. God conquers for the faithful.
'Behold, I set before you... a blessing and a curse.' The choice. Obedience or rebellion.
'Behold, I set before you... a blessing and a curse.' The choice. Obedience or rebellion.
'Behold, I set before you... a blessing and a curse.' The choice. Obedience or rebellion.
Set the blessing on Gerizim, the curse on Ebal. Two mounts. The choice is solemnly declared.
Set the blessing on Gerizim, the curse on Ebal. Two mounts. The choice is solemnly declared.
